string.text: Sometimes, in order to continue, you have to start anew… For me, that new start was waking up in this place. I no longer felt that I was the same man as before. For the first time in many years, I started feeling conscious and sympathetic toward others. I’m a mercenary by the callsign “Beast,” and this is my story.

Obscurant was quite the piece of work, and we never got along. The real “fun,” however, began when Jackal made me the commander of a small mercenary detachment, instead of Obscurant. On that same day, we traveled to the Cordon on a contract personally ordered by Jackal, and during that time, Obscurant started planning his revenge on me.

Vector was the previous head of the mercenary group, but he refused to fulfill a personal order from Jackal, who offered a reward for his head without hesitation. Vector, of course, managed to keep a low profile. I spent several months searching for him, but during the most crucial moment of my pursuit, I was thrown into the spatial anomaly. Okay… It’s time to get back to reality and look at how my meeting with Obscurant in the space bubble ended up.
And that was the moment when we left the anomaly. The surprises didn’t end there, though…
Now that’s a real man’s choice! You’ll need to shoot down as many crows as you can within a minute. Your record right now is
With that record, the bet is
Cannot open door; Van sees everything
You cannot sleep in this bed! You need to rent it from the barman first.
Door locked—the camp is on alert
Door locked—you must holster your weapon
Ammo has been placed in the personal box at Yanov for eliminating dangerous mutants
You cannot rest in this place. More secure shelter is required, where an emission can be survived.
This stash is empty. An empty stash marker has been placed.
A marker with a list of loot has been placed.
